resources.rdfs:label: D8 Hit dice
sa:description: Your Hit dice increases from D6 to D8. Either reroll your entire HP pool or add 1 hp for each HD you have.
If you gain other hit dice features from the free features in an archetype use the better one when calculating your hp.

resources.rdfs:label: D10 Hit dice
sa:description: Your Hit dice increases from D8 to D10. Either reroll your entire HP pool or add 1 hp for each HD you have.
If you gain other hit dice features from the free features in an archetype use the better one when calculating your hp.

resources.rdfs:label: D12 Hit dice
sa:description: Your Hit dice increases from D10 to D12. Either reroll your entire HP pool or add 1 hp for each HD you have.
If you gain other hit dice features from the free features in an archetype use the better one when calculating your hp.

resources.rdfs:label: Weapon Proficiency
sa:description: Gain proficiency with a weapon type

resources.rdfs:label: Save Proficiency
sa:description: Gain proficiency with 1 save.
Can be taken several times, cost increases by 2 xp for each additional time taken.

resources.rdfs:label: Skill proficiency
sa:description: Gain proficiency with 1 skill
Can be taken several times, cost increases by 1 xp for each additional time taken

resources.rdfs:label: Increased ability
sa:description: Increase the maximum ability for one of your abilities by 2 up to a maximum of 24.
Increase the same ability by 2 up to your maximum ability modifier.
Can be taken several times, costs increase by 2 xp for each additional time taken.

resources.rdfs:label: Ace pilot
sa:description: Select one specific aircraft or spacecraft. Add your proficiency bonus twice on pilot checks made using the chosen aircraft.
You can choose a new aircraft or spacecraft for this feature by spending at least 1 week flying it and only it.

resources.rdfs:label: Great Captain
sa:description: Spending your action to make a Charisma(Leadership) check lets a single member of your crew gain advantage on a single skill check, save or attack using your ship depending on your result. For example your pilot can gain advantage on his pilot check and your gunner gain advantage on his weapon systems attack rolls. If your crew members do not make a roll you can give advantage on by the start of your next turn the ability is wasted.

Alternatively you can cause an attack targeting your ship to gain disadvantage instead of giving one of your crew advantage on a roll. This can alternative can only be used once each turn and only against attacks that you are aware of.
IF your leadership check is 10 or higher you can choose two crew members, for every 5 points higher your check is over 10 you can designate another crew member to gain advantage on a check.
You have to be able to communicate your orders to your crew in order to use this ability.

resources.rdfs:label: Light armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain light armor proficiency

resources.rdfs:label: Medium armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain Medium armor proficiency

resources.rdfs:label: Heavy armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain Heavy armor proficiency

resources.rdfs:label: Powered armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain Powered armor proficiency

resources.rdfs:label: Unarmored master
sa:description: Gain resistance to spell damage and advantage on saves versus spell effects when you are wearing no armor.
Gain +1 dex or + 1 con

resources.rdfs:label: Light armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 Str or Dex
Increase max dex bonus of all light armors by 2 and decrease effective weight of worn light armors by 20 kilos to minimum of 0.

resources.rdfs:label: Medium armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
Increase max dex bonus of all medium armors by 1 and never gain disadvantage on stealth, athletics, acrobatics, fly or ride due to wearing medium armors.

resources.rdfs:label: Heavy armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
When you are wearing heavy armor the damage you take from nonmagical physical damage is reduced by 3.
When you are wearing magical heavy armor the damage you take from all physical damage is reduced by 3

resources.rdfs:label: Power armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
When you are wearing non-magical powerarmor you gain resistance to all nonmagical physical damage.
When you are wearing magical powerarmor you gain resistance to all physical damage.

resources.rdfs:label: Extra attack
sa:description: You can attack twice instead of once when you take the attack action on your turn.

If you are wielding more than one weapon and spend a bonus action to make attack to gain an extra attack from multi attack, you now gain two extra attacks instead of one neither of which gain your ability bonus as extra damage.

resources.rdfs:label: Extra attack 2
sa:description: You can attack three times instead of two times when you take the attack action on your turn.

resources.rdfs:label: Close quarters
sa:description: You can use a ranged weapon to good effect in melee and even manage an defence against deadly melee attacks.

Deal increased damage when using your ranged weapon as an improvised melee weapon. Damage depends on the size of your weapon: Tiny 1d4, Small 1d6, Medium 1d8, Large 1d10, Huge 1d12, no extra damage on criticals.
Once pr short rest you can choose to count as if you are wielding a melee weapon when targeted by a melee ability as long as you are wielding a ranged weapon.

resources.rdfs:label: Sword and shield style
sa:description: Your shield is just another of the weapons in your arsenal.
You can make make an attack using your wielded shield by spending a bonus action. The shield slam attack deals 1d6 + str mod damage, crit 19-20 +1.
Shields you wield count as a wielded one handed weapon.
Even though the name of this feature is Sword and shield style it can be used with any 1 handed weapon and a shield

resources.rdfs:label: Rage
sa:description: Your anger lends your strengt.

A rage lasts 1 minute. You can rage a number of times between each long rest equal to your proficiency bonus. Once you reach 7 proficiency bonus your rages last until you willingly exit them and you can rage an unlimited number of times between long rests.
When raging you gain a damage bonus to melee attack equal to your proficiency -1 and resistance to slashing, piercing, bludgeoning and ballistic damage.
You can enter a rage as a bonus action. Leaving a rage is a free action.
When raging you cannot use any skills with the exception of athletics, acrobatics and intimidate
If you can cast spells you can't cast them or concentrate on them while raging.

resources.rdfs:label: Frenzy
sa:description: Your anger burns white hot turning you into a whirlwind of melee attacks.
When you rage you can also choose to enter a frenzy, when you do you can make an extra melee attack as a bonus action whenever you take the attack action.

If you hit with a melee attack gained from spending a bonus action to gain an extra attack using dual wielding while in a frenzy you can choose to deal extra damage equal to the weapon damage from both weapons. For example if you are wielding a longsword and a shortsword you can choose to deal 1d8 + 1d6 extra damage if both attacks hit.
Upon exiting a frezy you gain a level of exhaustion.

resources.rdfs:label: Manually propelled shrapnel and other bits
sa:description: When you kill you kill with overwhelming damage and power propelling bone and armor into adjacent targets.

When you kill a target using a heavy or cleaving melee weapon, you can choose to inflict your proficiency bonus plus your str or dex bonus, whichever was used to make the attack, as damage to 1 target adjacent to the target you just damaged.

resources.rdfs:label: Shrapnel blasts
sa:description: As you fill your targets with bullets and munitions, shrapnel and ricochets hit adjacency targets.

When you kill a target or destroy a vehicle or building you can inflict your proficiency bonus plus your dexterity bonus to targets adjacent to or inside the target you just killed or destroyed. You cannot pick and choose targets, either all adjacent targets take damage or none do.
This damage is in addition to any damage targets inside vehicles or structures may take from their destruction and likely collapse.

resources.rdfs:label: Dismissed
sa:description: As your foes reel from your attacks, you seize upon their loss of balance to drive home a lethal advantage.

Whenever you deal 10 or more damage with a melee attack (using weapon damage dice only), your next melee attack against the same target before the end of your next turn deals damage as if it were a Critical Hit.

A Critical Hit delivered via this feature cannot trigger Dismissed again. However, it can be used to trigger the fear effect of the Execute action as a Bonus Action, and the target has disadvantage on the saving throw against that effect.

resources.rdfs:label: Flurry of steel
sa:description: You can extend the benefit from your flurry of blows to benefit a single type of melee weapon.
Choose one melee weapon you are proficient with, you can use this weapon with the flurry of blows feature.
This feature can be gained more than once, but applies to a new weapon each time.

resources.rdfs:label: Guarder shooter
sa:description: You can keep your cool and your shots still hit their mark when the swords or claws are flying at your face.
Do not gain disadvantage when you attack using a ranged weapon when you are within melee reach of hostile creatures.

Gain +1 dex or + 1 con

Light armor mastery.rdfs:label: Light armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 Str or Dex
Increase max dex bonus of all light armors by 2 and decrease effective weight of worn light armors by 20 kilos to minimum of 0.

Medium armor mastery.rdfs:label: Medium armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
Increase max dex bonus of all medium armors by 1 and never gain disadvantage on stealth, athletics, acrobatics, fly or ride due to wearing medium armors.

Heavy armor mastery.rdfs:label: Heavy armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
When you are wearing heavy armor the damage you take from nonmagical physical damage is reduced by 3.
When you are wearing magical heavy armor the damage you take from all physical damage is reduced by 3

Power armor mastery.rdfs:label: Power armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
When you are wearing non-magical powerarmor you gain resistance to all nonmagical physical damage.
When you are wearing magical powerarmor you gain resistance to all physical damage.

Extra attack.rdfs:label: Extra attack
sa:description: You can attack twice instead of once when you take the attack action on your turn.

If you are wielding more than one weapon and spend a bonus action to make attack to gain an extra attack from multi attack, you now gain two extra attacks instead of one neither of which gain your ability bonus as extra damage.

Extra attack 2.rdfs:label: Extra attack 2
sa:description: You can attack three times instead of two times when you take the attack action on your turn.

Close quarters.rdfs:label: Close quarters
sa:description: You can use a ranged weapon to good effect in melee and even manage an defence against deadly melee attacks.

Deal increased damage when using your ranged weapon as an improvised melee weapon. Damage depends on the size of your weapon: Tiny 1d4, Small 1d6, Medium 1d8, Large 1d10, Huge 1d12, no extra damage on criticals.
Once pr short rest you can choose to count as if you are wielding a melee weapon when targeted by a melee ability as long as you are wielding a ranged weapon.

Sword and shield style.rdfs:label: Sword and shield style
sa:description: Your shield is just another of the weapons in your arsenal.
You can make make an attack using your wielded shield by spending a bonus action. The shield slam attack deals 1d6 + str mod damage, crit 19-20 +1.
Shields you wield count as a wielded one handed weapon.
Even though the name of this feature is Sword and shield style it can be used with any 1 handed weapon and a shield

Rage.rdfs:label: Rage
sa:description: Your anger lends your strengt.

A rage lasts 1 minute. You can rage a number of times between each long rest equal to your proficiency bonus. Once you reach 7 proficiency bonus your rages last until you willingly exit them and you can rage an unlimited number of times between long rests.
When raging you gain a damage bonus to melee attack equal to your proficiency -1 and resistance to slashing, piercing, bludgeoning and ballistic damage.
You can enter a rage as a bonus action. Leaving a rage is a free action.
When raging you cannot use any skills with the exception of athletics, acrobatics and intimidate
If you can cast spells you can't cast them or concentrate on them while raging.

Frenzy.rdfs:label: Frenzy
sa:description: Your anger burns white hot turning you into a whirlwind of melee attacks.
When you rage you can also choose to enter a frenzy, when you do you can make an extra melee attack as a bonus action whenever you take the attack action.

If you hit with a melee attack gained from spending a bonus action to gain an extra attack using dual wielding while in a frenzy you can choose to deal extra damage equal to the weapon damage from both weapons. For example if you are wielding a longsword and a shortsword you can choose to deal 1d8 + 1d6 extra damage if both attacks hit.
Upon exiting a frezy you gain a level of exhaustion.

Manually propelled shrapnel and other bi.rdfs:label: Manually propelled shrapnel and other bits
sa:description: When you kill you kill with overwhelming damage and power propelling bone and armor into adjacent targets.

When you kill a target using a heavy or cleaving melee weapon, you can choose to inflict your proficiency bonus plus your str or dex bonus, whichever was used to make the attack, as damage to 1 target adjacent to the target you just damaged.

Shrapnel blasts.rdfs:label: Shrapnel blasts
sa:description: As you fill your targets with bullets and munitions, shrapnel and ricochets hit adjacency targets.

When you kill a target or destroy a vehicle or building you can inflict your proficiency bonus plus your dexterity bonus to targets adjacent to or inside the target you just killed or destroyed. You cannot pick and choose targets, either all adjacent targets take damage or none do.
This damage is in addition to any damage targets inside vehicles or structures may take from their destruction and likely collapse.

Dismissed.rdfs:label: Dismissed
sa:description: As your foes reel from your attacks, you seize upon their loss of balance to drive home a lethal advantage.

Whenever you deal 10 or more damage with a melee attack (using weapon damage dice only), your next melee attack against the same target before the end of your next turn deals damage as if it were a Critical Hit.

A Critical Hit delivered via this feature cannot trigger Dismissed again. However, it can be used to trigger the fear effect of the Execute action as a Bonus Action, and the target has disadvantage on the saving throw against that effect.

Flurry of steel.rdfs:label: Flurry of steel
sa:description: You can extend the benefit from your flurry of blows to benefit a single type of melee weapon.
Choose one melee weapon you are proficient with, you can use this weapon with the flurry of blows feature.
This feature can be gained more than once, but applies to a new weapon each time.

Guarder shooter.rdfs:label: Guarder shooter
sa:description: You can keep your cool and your shots still hit their mark when the swords or claws are flying at your face.
Do not gain disadvantage when you attack using a ranged weapon when you are within melee reach of hostile creatures.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: D8 Hit dice
sa:description: Your Hit dice increases from D6 to D8. Either reroll your entire HP pool or add 1 hp for each HD you have.
If you gain other hit dice features from the free features in an archetype use the better one when calculating your hp.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: D10 Hit dice
sa:description: Your Hit dice increases from D8 to D10. Either reroll your entire HP pool or add 1 hp for each HD you have.
If you gain other hit dice features from the free features in an archetype use the better one when calculating your hp.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: D12 Hit dice
sa:description: Your Hit dice increases from D10 to D12. Either reroll your entire HP pool or add 1 hp for each HD you have.
If you gain other hit dice features from the free features in an archetype use the better one when calculating your hp.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Weapon Proficiency
sa:description: Gain proficiency with a weapon type

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Save Proficiency
sa:description: Gain proficiency with 1 save.
Can be taken several times, cost increases by 2 xp for each additional time taken.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Skill proficiency
sa:description: Gain proficiency with 1 skill
Can be taken several times, cost increases by 1 xp for each additional time taken

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Increased ability
sa:description: Increase the maximum ability for one of your abilities by 2 up to a maximum of 24.
Increase the same ability by 2 up to your maximum ability modifier.
Can be taken several times, costs increase by 2 xp for each additional time taken.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Ace pilot
sa:description: Select one specific aircraft or spacecraft. Add your proficiency bonus twice on pilot checks made using the chosen aircraft.
You can choose a new aircraft or spacecraft for this feature by spending at least 1 week flying it and only it.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Great Captain
sa:description: Spending your action to make a Charisma(Leadership) check lets a single member of your crew gain advantage on a single skill check, save or attack using your ship depending on your result. For example your pilot can gain advantage on his pilot check and your gunner gain advantage on his weapon systems attack rolls. If your crew members do not make a roll you can give advantage on by the start of your next turn the ability is wasted.

Alternatively you can cause an attack targeting your ship to gain disadvantage instead of giving one of your crew advantage on a roll. This can alternative can only be used once each turn and only against attacks that you are aware of.
IF your leadership check is 10 or higher you can choose two crew members, for every 5 points higher your check is over 10 you can designate another crew member to gain advantage on a check.
You have to be able to communicate your orders to your crew in order to use this ability.

sa:description: Gain light armor proficiency

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Medium armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain Medium armor proficiency

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Heavy armor proficiency

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: D8 Hit dice
sa:description: Your Hit dice increases from D6 to D8. Either reroll your entire HP pool or add 1 hp for each HD you have.
If you gain other hit dice features from the free features in an archetype use the better one when calculating your hp.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: D10 Hit dice
sa:description: Your Hit dice increases from D8 to D10. Either reroll your entire HP pool or add 1 hp for each HD you have.
If you gain other hit dice features from the free features in an archetype use the better one when calculating your hp.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: D12 Hit dice
sa:description: Your Hit dice increases from D10 to D12. Either reroll your entire HP pool or add 1 hp for each HD you have.
If you gain other hit dice features from the free features in an archetype use the better one when calculating your hp.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Weapon Proficiency
sa:description: Gain proficiency with a weapon type

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Save Proficiency
sa:description: Gain proficiency with 1 save.
Can be taken several times, cost increases by 2 xp for each additional time taken.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Skill proficiency
sa:description: Gain proficiency with 1 skill
Can be taken several times, cost increases by 1 xp for each additional time taken

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Increased ability
sa:description: Increase the maximum ability for one of your abilities by 2 up to a maximum of 24.
Increase the same ability by 2 up to your maximum ability modifier.
Can be taken several times, costs increase by 2 xp for each additional time taken.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Ace pilot
sa:description: Select one specific aircraft or spacecraft. Add your proficiency bonus twice on pilot checks made using the chosen aircraft.
You can choose a new aircraft or spacecraft for this feature by spending at least 1 week flying it and only it.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Great Captain
sa:description: Spending your action to make a Charisma(Leadership) check lets a single member of your crew gain advantage on a single skill check, save or attack using your ship depending on your result. For example your pilot can gain advantage on his pilot check and your gunner gain advantage on his weapon systems attack rolls. If your crew members do not make a roll you can give advantage on by the start of your next turn the ability is wasted.

Alternatively you can cause an attack targeting your ship to gain disadvantage instead of giving one of your crew advantage on a roll. This can alternative can only be used once each turn and only against attacks that you are aware of.
IF your leadership check is 10 or higher you can choose two crew members, for every 5 points higher your check is over 10 you can designate another crew member to gain advantage on a check.
You have to be able to communicate your orders to your crew in order to use this ability.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Light armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain light armor proficiency

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Medium armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain Medium armor proficiency

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Heavy armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain Heavy armor proficiency

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Powered armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain Powered armor proficiency

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Unarmored master
sa:description: Gain resistance to spell damage and advantage on saves versus spell effects when you are wearing no armor.
Gain +1 dex or + 1 con

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Light armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 Str or Dex
Increase max dex bonus of all light armors by 2 and decrease effective weight of worn light armors by 20 kilos to minimum of 0.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Medium armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
Increase max dex bonus of all medium armors by 1 and never gain disadvantage on stealth, athletics, acrobatics, fly or ride due to wearing medium armors.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Heavy armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
When you are wearing heavy armor the damage you take from nonmagical physical damage is reduced by 3.
When you are wearing magical heavy armor the damage you take from all physical damage is reduced by 3

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Power armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
When you are wearing non-magical powerarmor you gain resistance to all nonmagical physical damage.
When you are wearing magical powerarmor you gain resistance to all physical damage.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Extra attack
sa:description: You can attack twice instead of once when you take the attack action on your turn.

If you are wielding more than one weapon and spend a bonus action to make attack to gain an extra attack from multi attack, you now gain two extra attacks instead of one neither of which gain your ability bonus as extra damage.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Extra attack 2
sa:description: You can attack three times instead of two times when you take the attack action on your turn.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Close quarters
sa:description: You can use a ranged weapon to good effect in melee and even manage an defence against deadly melee attacks.

Deal increased damage when using your ranged weapon as an improvised melee weapon. Damage depends on the size of your weapon: Tiny 1d4, Small 1d6, Medium 1d8, Large 1d10, Huge 1d12, no extra damage on criticals.
Once pr short rest you can choose to count as if you are wielding a melee weapon when targeted by a melee ability as long as you are wielding a ranged weapon.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Sword and shield style
sa:description: Your shield is just another of the weapons in your arsenal.
You can make make an attack using your wielded shield by spending a bonus action. The shield slam attack deals 1d6 + str mod damage, crit 19-20 +1.
Shields you wield count as a wielded one handed weapon.
Even though the name of this feature is Sword and shield style it can be used with any 1 handed weapon and a shield

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Rage
sa:description: Your anger lends your strengt.

A rage lasts 1 minute. You can rage a number of times between each long rest equal to your proficiency bonus. Once you reach 7 proficiency bonus your rages last until you willingly exit them and you can rage an unlimited number of times between long rests.
When raging you gain a damage bonus to melee attack equal to your proficiency -1 and resistance to slashing, piercing, bludgeoning and ballistic damage.
You can enter a rage as a bonus action. Leaving a rage is a free action.
When raging you cannot use any skills with the exception of athletics, acrobatics and intimidate
If you can cast spells you can't cast them or concentrate on them while raging.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Frenzy
sa:description: Your anger burns white hot turning you into a whirlwind of melee attacks.
When you rage you can also choose to enter a frenzy, when you do you can make an extra melee attack as a bonus action whenever you take the attack action.

If you hit with a melee attack gained from spending a bonus action to gain an extra attack using dual wielding while in a frenzy you can choose to deal extra damage equal to the weapon damage from both weapons. For example if you are wielding a longsword and a shortsword you can choose to deal 1d8 + 1d6 extra damage if both attacks hit.
Upon exiting a frezy you gain a level of exhaustion.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Manually propelled shrapnel and other bits
sa:description: When you kill you kill with overwhelming damage and power propelling bone and armor into adjacent targets.

When you kill a target using a heavy or cleaving melee weapon, you can choose to inflict your proficiency bonus plus your str or dex bonus, whichever was used to make the attack, as damage to 1 target adjacent to the target you just damaged.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Shrapnel blasts
sa:description: As you fill your targets with bullets and munitions, shrapnel and ricochets hit adjacency targets.

When you kill a target or destroy a vehicle or building you can inflict your proficiency bonus plus your dexterity bonus to targets adjacent to or inside the target you just killed or destroyed. You cannot pick and choose targets, either all adjacent targets take damage or none do.
This damage is in addition to any damage targets inside vehicles or structures may take from their destruction and likely collapse.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Dismissed
sa:description: As your foes reel from your attacks, you seize upon their loss of balance to drive home a lethal advantage.

Whenever you deal 10 or more damage with a melee attack (using weapon damage dice only), your next melee attack against the same target before the end of your next turn deals damage as if it were a Critical Hit.

A Critical Hit delivered via this feature cannot trigger Dismissed again. However, it can be used to trigger the fear effect of the Execute action as a Bonus Action, and the target has disadvantage on the saving throw against that effect.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Flurry of steel
sa:description: You can extend the benefit from your flurry of blows to benefit a single type of melee weapon.
Choose one melee weapon you are proficient with, you can use this weapon with the flurry of blows feature.
This feature can be gained more than once, but applies to a new weapon each time.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Guarder shooter
sa:description: You can keep your cool and your shots still hit their mark when the swords or claws are flying at your face.
Do not gain disadvantage when you attack using a ranged weapon when you are within melee reach of hostile creatures.
